commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a temp-directory tracker helper, a report-only diff scanner for new bare test temp-directory creation, focused tests, and testing-guide documentation.

PR surface: Tests +232, Docs +29, Other +175. Total +436 across 7 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a test-tooling and documentation cleanup PR, not a user bug report. The prior review finding is source-checkable and the latest diff now covers the matcher regression.
commands.review_followup: This maintainer-labeled PR should remain in normal human landing review; no narrow ClawSweeper repair is needed for the diff, but the current lint check must be green before merge.

target.title: test: add temp directory helper guidance
target.body:
## Summary
- Close out the hard cleanup-sufficiency scanner approach from #78416 with a helper-first replacement.
- Extend `test/helpers/temp-dir.ts` with an explicit tracker API and more robust cleanup retries.
- Add a report-only `scripts/report-test-temp-creations.mjs` migration aid that inspects added diff lines for new bare temp-dir creation without judging cleanup data flow.
- Document the recommended temp-dir helper pattern in the testing guide.

## Verification
- `pnpm test test/helpers/temp-dir.test.ts test/scripts/report-test-temp-creations.test.ts`
- `node scripts/report-test-temp-creations.mjs --base origin/main --head HEAD`
- `node scripts/report-test-temp-creations.mjs --help`
- `pnpm dlx --config.resolution-mode=highest markdownlint-cli2 --config config/markdownlint-cli2.jsonc docs/help/testing.md`
- `pnpm lint:scripts`
- `npm_config_registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/ node scripts/check-changed.mjs`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode branch --base origin/main --parallel-tests "npm_config_registry=https://registry.npmjs.org/ node scripts/check-changed.mjs"` clean: no accepted/actionable findings

commands.command: re-review please. addressed the remaining docs blocker on latest rebased head `24dab796a6`: `docs/plugins/sdk-runtime.md` now documents the 3,000 live-row plugin-state cap and current-namespace eviction behavior. i also reran the proof/checks using the existing system node install only: `node v26.2.0` at `/usr/bin/node`. validation passed: - `pnpm docs:list` - `git diff --check origin/main..head` - `oxfmt --check` on touched source/tests/docs - plugin-state tests: `23 passed` - plugin-state e2e cap case: `1 passed | 11 skipped` - telegram message-cache tests: `16 passed` - real runtime plugin-state probe at 2989 message-cache + 11 topic-cache rows, with `msg-new` succeeding and only `msg-0000` evicted - `pnpm run tsgo:core` - `pnpm run tsgo:test:src` pr body has been updated with the node 26.2 proof for this exact head.

I also reran the proof/checks using the existing system Node install only: `node v26.2.0` at `/usr/bin/node`. Validation passed: - `pnpm docs:list` - `git diff --check origin/main..HEAD` - `oxfmt --check` on touched source/tests/docs - plugin-state tests: `23 passed` - plugin-state e2e cap case: `1 passed | 11 skipped` - Telegram message-cache tests: `16 passed` - real runtime plugin-state probe at 2989 message-cache + 11 topic-cache rows, with `msg-new` succeeding and only `msg-0000` evicted - `pnpm run tsgo:core` - `pnpm run tsgo:test:src` PR body has been updated with the Node 26.2 proof for this exact head.
